OmniScript.description: sample reusable OmniScript - updating embedded script
OmniScript.name: Company Mailing Address

omniProcessElements.name: DataRaptorExtractAction1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "bundle" : "reusableCompanyMailingAddress", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "AccountId" } ], "enableActionMessage" : false, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "ignoreCache" : false, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "label" : "DataRaptorExtractAction1", "message" : { }, "postMessage" : "Done", "pubsub" : false, "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "validationRequired" : "Step", "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: AccountMailingCity
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "autocomplete" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 4, "debounceValue" : 0, "defaultValue" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "City", "mask" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "pattern" : "", "placeholder" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "readOnly" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "required" : false, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: StepAddress
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : true, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "chartLabel" : null, "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "instruction" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "knowledgeOptions" : { "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "keyword" : "", "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "label" : "Mailing Address", "message" : { }, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "pubsub" : false, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "validationRequired" : true, "wpm" : false }
